MEP Engineering
Solutions

Harnessing 23+ years of multidisciplinary experience across diverse sectors worldwide

🛡

23+ years of specialized MEP engineering experience

Led by Mr. Devendra P Dhake, MEPTEQ brings over two decades of expertise in delivering tailored building services engineering across multiple sectors.

🌐

Diverse sector expertise across global markets

Extensive project work in Hotels, Institutional, Commercial, Residential, Industrial, and Healthcare sectors across the Middle East, India, and Africa regions.

📄

Comprehensive MEP consultancy services

Offering detailed studies, cost estimation, design, bid analysis, construction supervision, and quality control to ensure technical excellence and project success.

🏢

Strong foundation from industry leaders

Founder's prior roles at PPC Limited (Philips Electronics affiliate) and Batliboi Limited underpin MEPTEQ's commitment to quality and innovation in engineering solutions.

ABOUT US

Engineering solutions for buildings that perform.

Mepteq Global Engineering & Consultancy is a multidisciplinary engineering consulting company delivering HVAC, Plumbing, Electrical and Fire Protection solutions with a strong focus on quality, innovation and sustainability.

With decades of combined experience, we have successfully executed commercial, residential, healthcare and industrial projects across India, the Middle East and Africa.

✔ Studies, Reports & Surveys
✔ Scrutiny & Analysis of Bids
✔ Cost Estimation & Feasibility
✔ Supervision & Project Management
✔ Detailed Design & Drawings
✔ Quality Control & Commissioning

Meet Our Leadership

Founder & Principal Consultant

Mr. Devendra P. Dhake

A seasoned MEP professional with over two decades of excellence, Mr. Dhake founded Mepteq Global Engineering & Consultancy to deliver innovative, cost-efficient, and sustainable engineering solutions across India, the Middle East, and Africa. He has worked with prestigious organisations including PPC Limited (West Africa), Batliboi Limited, Videocon Group, and Al Zarooni Group (UAE).

MEP ConsultancyISHRAE MemberFSAI Member

Director Design  |  IGBC-AP Certified

Mr. Manish Kumar Singh

A BITS Pilani graduate with nearly two decades of MEPF design experience, Mr. Singh has led landmark projects including the JW Marriott Dubai — the world's tallest hotel tower. He has worked with AECOM India, Stantec, Sterling & Wilson (Qatar), and BILT Middle East LLC (Dubai). His expertise spans HVAC, plumbing, fire protection, and energy-efficient systems.

IGBC AP CertifiedASHRAE / NFPAMEPF Design
OUR SERVICES

Engineering disciplines delivered with one coordinated vision.

Explore our core service verticals across plumbing, fire protection, electrical, ELV and HVAC systems. Every scope below is included as part of our multidisciplinary design and consultancy delivery.

Plumbing & Fire Protection

Integrated water, drainage and safety infrastructure.

Complete plumbing and fire protection solutions covering distribution networks, treatment systems and life-safety installations for commercial, residential and industrial facilities.

💧Water Supply
🌀Drainage & Sewerage
🚰Building Plumbing
🧪Water Filtration
♻Waste Water Treatment
⚗RO Plant
🔥Gas Distribution
Hydraulic Networks

Distribution Piping Systems

Coordinated supply, return and service pipe layouts for efficient building performance.

Life Safety

Fire Protection Coverage

Sprinkler, hydrant and extinguishing systems designed for rapid response and code compliance.

Fixtures & Fittings

Building Plumbing Interfaces

Smart fixture coordination for utility areas, washrooms and process installations.

Electrical & ELV System

Power, controls and low-voltage intelligence in one package.

End-to-end electrical and ELV engineering for resilient power distribution, safety systems, communications and building monitoring environments.

💡Lighting Distribution
⚡Power Distribution
🔋Power Generation Systems
❄Chilled Water Systems
🚨Fire & Security Alarm System
📡Communication system
📹CCTV
Electrical Rooms

Control Panels & Distribution Boards

Switchgear, monitoring and load management solutions for stable operations.

Connected Buildings

ELV Infrastructure Integration

Access control, structured cabling, PA systems and smart-device coordination.

Security Layer

Monitoring & Access Systems

Alarm, surveillance and interface points built around occupant safety and control.

HVAC Services

Thermal comfort engineered for performance and efficiency.

Specialized HVAC design and execution support for cooling, air distribution and energy-efficient systems tuned to diverse building typologies.

🧊Specialized Air-Conditioning
🌀Variable Refrigerant Volume (VRV)
🏢Central Air-Conditioning
❄Chilled Water Systems
🌿Energy-Efficient Solutions
Exterior Equipment

Air-Cooled System Arrays

Packaged outdoor equipment coordination for stable and responsive cooling delivery.

Central Plant

High-Capacity HVAC Networks

Plantroom-scale cooling infrastructure for large campuses and complex facilities.

Optimized Comfort

Energy-Conscious Air Distribution

Balanced thermal control strategies that improve comfort while reducing operating costs.

Showcasing 23 Years of Global MEP Project Excellence

Highlighting 500+ diverse projects across commercial, residential, hospitality, and industrial sectors worldwide

Expertise

Over 23 years delivering comprehensive MEP solutions worldwide with technical excellence and global compliance.

2

Portfolio

Involved in 500+ projects across pharmaceuticals, hotels, villas, and towers, showing versatility and sector knowledge.

3

Flagship

Projects like Burj Khalifa, Weatherford Oils & Tools, Abu-Dhabi and Radisson Hotels highlight ability to manage complex, high-profile developments.

4

Services

Specialized in MEP audits and rectification, ensuring operational efficiency and system optimization for facilities.

5

Versatility

Proven across commercial, residential, hospitality, and industrial sectors, adapting MEP designs to varied needs.

OUR PROJECTS

Selected engineering and construction portfolios.

500+ diverse projects across commercial, residential, hospitality, and industrial sectors worldwide.

Diu–Ghoghla Ropeway Terminal Project

Mr. Devendra Dhake is serving as the MEP Consultant for the terminal building of the Diu–Ghoghla Beach Cable Car Station, developed by Aadharshila Arkins (India) Pvt. Ltd., part of India's first indigenously developed and longest ropeway project. His scope includes complete MEP&FLS design covering HVAC, power distribution, water management, and fire protection systems, with a focus on energy efficiency, operational safety, and sustainability.

Goregaon Sports Club (GSC)

At the Goregaon Sports Club, Mr. Devendra Dhake is presently engaged as the MEP Consultant for the ongoing modernization and capacity enhancement of the existing chilled water plant system. The project involves the detailed design and value engineering of an additional 500 TR chiller, seamlessly integrated with the aging HVAC infrastructure to improve overall system performance, higher reliability, and energy efficiency.

Join our MEP consultancy team where design precision, technical coordination and project delivery come together. Apply for the opening that matches your expertise.
